sentences.arabic: النِّيَّةُ هِيَ أَسَاسُ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ فِي الدِّينِ.
sentences.translation: Nijjet je osnova svakog djela u vjeri.
sentences.translationEn: Intention is the foundation of every action in religion.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama" [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: "Actions are but by intentions" [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ اللَّهَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى قَلْبِ الْمُسْلِمِ وَمَقْصِدِهِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da Allah gleda u srce muslimana i njegov cilj.
sentences.translationEn: This means that Allah looks at the heart and the purpose of the Muslim.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نَفْعَلَ الْخَيْرَ لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Moramo činiti dobro samo radi Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: We must do good deeds for the sake of Allah alone.

sentences.arabic: الْإِخْلَاصُ هُوَ الَّذِي يَجْعَلُ الْعَمَلَ مَقْبُولًا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost je ono što čini djelo primljenim kod Uzvišenog Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity is what makes the deed acceptable to Allah the Almighty.
